name: SocialButton
description: OAuth-style login button for 7 brands, 2 styles (filled/stroke), icon-only mode. Brand logos use RemixIcon's brand glyphs rather than the original multi-color Figma assets, per the project's Remix-Icon-only rule.

brand.description: Drives brand color and RemixIcon glyph

style.description: filled = solid brand-colored surface; stroke = white bordered surface with brand-colored icon

onlyIcon.description: Renders as a square icon-only button

aria: aria-label set to the login text when onlyIcon is true
